test_cases.title: Successful Login with Valid Credentials
test_cases.description: Test login functionality with valid username/email and password.

test_cases.title: Login with Invalid Credentials
test_cases.description: Test login functionality with invalid username/email or password.

test_cases.title: Login with Empty Credentials
test_cases.description: Test login functionality with empty username/email and password fields.

test_cases.title: Add Product to Shopping Cart
test_cases.description: Test adding a product to the shopping cart after logging in.
steps: Browse store and select a product.
test_cases.expected_result: Product is added to the shopping cart.

test_cases.title: Proceed to Checkout with Empty Cart
test_cases.description: Test proceeding to checkout with an empty shopping cart.
test_cases.expected_result: User is unable to proceed to checkout.

test_cases.title: Checkout with Delivery Option
test_cases.description: Test checkout process with delivery option selected.
test_cases.expected_result: Order is confirmed and saved with delivery option and address.

test_cases.title: Checkout with Pickup Option
test_cases.description: Test checkout process with pickup option selected.
test_cases.expected_result: Order is confirmed and saved with pickup option.

test_cases.title: Checkout without Selecting Fulfillment Option
test_cases.description: Test checkout process without selecting any fulfillment option.
steps: Attempt to confirm order without selecting fulfillment option.
test_cases.expected_result: User is prompted to select a fulfillment option.

test_cases.title: Order Confirmation without Payment
test_cases.description: Test that order is confirmed without processing payment at checkout.
test_cases.expected_result: Order is confirmed and saved without payment processing.

test_cases.title: Invalid Delivery Address
test_cases.description: Test checkout process with invalid delivery address.
test_cases.expected_result: User is prompted to enter a valid delivery address.
